title: Greek Salad
description: A classic Greek salad made with fresh vegetables and a tangy dressing. Perfect for a quick and healthy meal.
instructions: Chop the cabbage into thin shreds.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, Greek salad dressing, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
Toss to combine and adjust the dressing to taste.
If using, stir in the sour cream and Greek yogurt.
Serve immediately and garnish with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
